title: koeleria delavignei
intro: Koeleria delavignei, also known as Delavigne's hair grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Koeleria delavignei include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Koeleria delavignei is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
